message:
Redact single-pair form bodies when the key is sensitive in VCR cassettes

Previously looks_like_form_body_text required at least two key=value
pairs to avoid false-positive form detection on plain text. OAuth token
requests often send a single field like refresh_token=<secret> without a
Content-Type header, causing the secret to leak into cassettes. Now
single-pair bodies are treated as form data when the key matches the
existing sensitive-key list, including URL-encoded variants like
client%5Fsecret.

Refactor poison-mutex test helpers into reusable poison_overrides_entry()
and resume_unwind_while_holding(). Add six new tests covering
single-field redaction, encoded key redaction, non-sensitive single-pair
passthrough, and cassette-level redaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
